warning_high_percent: Warning: This swap represents a high percentage of the pool. Large swaps may cause significant price impact or fail. Consider swapping a smaller amount or splitting into multiple transactions.
title: Swap Tokens
description: Swap tokens seamlessly on Vanellix Hub using Uniswap V2.
from_tooltip: Select the token you want to swap from and enter the amount.
to_tooltip: Select the token you want to receive.
price_tooltip: The current price ratio between the input and output tokens.
slippage_tooltip: The maximum price slippage you're willing to accept (1%).
minimum_received_tooltip: The minimum amount of tokens you'll receive after slippage.
liquidity_tooltip: The total available liquidity of the output token in the pool.
percent_of_pool_tooltip: The percentage of the total pool that this swap represents.
error_no_liquidity: No liquidity found for this pair.
